goal: Add a side-effect-free request-packet builder for runtime patch permit issuance readiness while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Runtime patch permit issuance readiness can be converted into a request packet without issuing a permit.
Request and requester refs are required.
Runtime execution remains false and disallowed.
assumptions: Actual authority review, permit issuance, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing request ref, and blocked readiness cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-093 classified runtime patch permit issuance readiness without issuing a permit or enabling execution.
